name: Espresso Nut Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Finely chopped pecans or walnuts
1 tablespoon Instant espresso or instant coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt; set aside.
2. In a large bowl, cream butter well. Gradually beat in sugars until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in egg and espresso until well mixed. Stir in the flour mixture until well blended.
4. Stir in nuts. Shape dough into two 2-inch diameter rolls.
5. Wrap tightly; chill for 4 hours or until firm.
6. Using a sharp, thin knife, cut slices 1/4 inch thick.
7. Place slices 1 inch apart on a lightly greased baking sheet.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 375 degrees for 9 to 11 minutes, or until slightly firm.
9. Remove from racks; cool.
Holiday Decorations
Use tube icing with star tip to make Santa face and hat pompon. Use a leaf tip to make the hat. Give eyes sparkle with silver dragees.
